briefdescription.para: This configure target address and BCR register values of available devices to the controller RAM.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is the number of slave devices present.

briefdescription.para: Initializes the XI3c slaves devices by disable/enable events and reset dynamic addresses.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: Initializes a specific XI3c instance such that the driver is ready to use.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a reference to a structure containing information about a specific I3C device. This function initializes an InstancePtr object for a specific device specified by the contents of Config.

is the device base address in the virtual memory address space. The caller is responsible for keeping the address mapping from EffectiveAddr to the device physical base address unchanged once this function is invoked. Unexpected errors may occur if the address mapping changes after this function is called. If address translation is not used, use ConfigPtr->BaseAddress for this parameter, passing the physical address instead.

simplesect.para: The return value is XST_SUCCESS if successful.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c_Cmd instance.

inbodydescription.para: < Repeated start or Termination on Completion: 4th bit
< RW: 8th bit + Device address: 9 to 15 bits
< No.of bytes R/W to/from R/W FIFOs

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the base address of the device.

briefdescription.para: This function sends dynamic Address Assignment for available devices.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is an array of dynamic addresses.
is the number of slave devices present.
